title: pimpinella pusilla
intro: Pimpinella pusilla, also known as Dill Pimpinella or small burnet-saxifrage, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Pimpinella pusilla include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in herbal remedies and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
